nodes.name: LC

nodes.name: White-winged swallow

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Occasional vagrants reach Panama. They are usually not found on the Pacific coast, especially in the southern portion of South America. The species is usually found in or near lowland areas along bodies of water such as rivers or lakes, at elevations of about . It is resident in most of its range, although in the most southerly part it is migratory
